name: RABBIT-CAGE-BUG-49
title: Stale .pyc files committed/checked-in under hooks and test __pycache__
description: Two compiled bytecode files exist in the feature tree: .claude/features/rabbit-cage/hooks/__pycache__/scope-guard.cpython-37.pyc and .claude/features/rabbit-cage/test/__pycache__/run.cpython-37.pyc. __pycache__ directories should be gitignored repo-wide. Either add __pycache__/ to .gitignore (recommended) or rm -r these directories and add the ignore rule to prevent recurrence.

history.note: wave-4 cleanup; fixed in e10610a (impl) and 91f2c68 (tests)
